headline: 21 Days Of Iran War Just Rewrote Market History – These 7 Charts Show Why
summary: Brent up 49%, diesel up 61% — an all-time record — gold crashing against oil, UK yields spiking like the Liz Truss shock. Seven charts show why 21 days of conflict already look like a macro regime change.
